title: Optimize AWS Compute Workloads
explanation: Compute workloads increased 38% week-over-week without proportional ARR or feature growth. Reserved capacity could reduce costs by 20-25%.

title: Reduce Unused Salesforce Seats
explanation: Salesforce license utilization is 71%. 148 inactive seats identified. Renewal in 64 days.

title: Reprice Premium Support for High-Touch Accounts
explanation: AlphaCorp, BluePeak Retail, and Orbital Logistics consume support above contract assumptions. Gross margin 12-18% below portfolio average.

title: Consolidate Duplicate Analytics Tools
explanation: Product, Marketing, and RevOps are using overlapping analytics tools. Consolidation would eliminate $370K in annual redundancy.

title: Pause Low-Conversion Paid Campaigns
explanation: Paid acquisition spend in Segment C is underperforming — conversion rate 2.1x below average.

title: Renegotiate DataStack Renewal
explanation: DataStack renewal due in 32 days with expected 18% price increase. Usage is moderate.

title: Standardize Enterprise Onboarding Playbook
explanation: Implementation variance causes 40-60% cost overruns on onboarding. Standardizing would improve implementation margin significantly.
